'''maomao''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:maomao|maomao]] (bear-sized companion)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-?-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maomao|maomao]] (bear-sized companion)
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || mæ?imith || mæ?imij || mæ?imish || mæ?imi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || ma?u?umuth || ma?u?umuj || ma?u?umush || ma?u?umu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || ma?umuth || ma?umuj || ma?umush || ma?umu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || ma?ufmufth || ma?ufmufj || ma?ufmufsh || ma?ufmuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || mæ?emeth || mæ?emej || mæ?emesh || mæ?eme
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || ma?o?omoth || ma?o?omoj || ma?o?omosh || ma?o?omo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || ma?omoth || ma?omoj || ma?omosh || ma?omo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || ma?ofmofth || ma?ofmofj || ma?ofmofsh || ma?ofmof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || mæ?ïfmïfth || mæ?ïfmïfj || mæ?ïfmïfsh || mæ?ïfmïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ma?ïf?ïfmïfth || ma?ïf?ïfmïfj || ma?ïf?ïfmïfsh || ma?ïf?ïfmïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ma?ïfmïfth || ma?ïfmïfj || ma?ïfmïfsh || ma?ïfmïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ma?ïffmïffth || ma?ïffmïffj || ma?ïffmïffsh || ma?ïffmïff
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || mæ?æmæth || mæ?æmæj || mæ?æmæsh || mæ?æmæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || ma?a?amath || ma?a?amaj || ma?a?amash || ma?a?ama
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || ma?amath || ma?amaj || ma?amash || ma?ama
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || ma?afmafth || ma?afmafj || ma?afmafsh || ma?afmaf
|}

''64 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ma?amatha || ma?amaja || ma?amasha || ma?amaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || ma?amath || ma?amaj || ma?amash || ma?ama
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ma?amathal || ma?amajal || ma?amashal || ma?amakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ma?amaathatha || ma?amaajaja || ma?amaashasha || ma?amaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || ma?amathan || ma?amajan || ma?amashan || ma?amakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ma?amathaoro || ma?amajaoro || ma?amashaoro || ma?amakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
